action.reasoning: Observation: Best avg_precision now 0.2190 (val AP 0.2347) with 2048/6-layer MLP on 4096-dim r2+r3 Morgan FP after 150 epochs; loss ~0.007 but no jsonl metrics (curves outdated from iter8); train.py truncated; PyG still segfaults. Analysis: Capacity can be boosted (hidden=3072/layers=7/dropout=0.05) with lower init LR=2e-4, higher patience=30, 200 epochs for better convergence on imbalance (masked BCE+pos_weight solid); full non-truncated train.py with DataLoader(bs=8192), per-epoch jsonl logging (epoch/loss/val_ap/lr), grad_clip, BN will enable curves and push AP higher without OOM/NaNs (caches ensure ~40min run). Decision: Rewrite all 3 files for updated arch/defaults + complete robust code with logging; train fully then submit_eval on best.pt.
